name: Aya Gold & Silver Inc.
description: Aya Gold & Silver Inc. is a rapidly growing, Canada-based silver producer with operations in the Kingdom of Morocco. The company's flagship asset is the high-grade Zgounder Silver Mine, which is currently being expanded. Aya also operates the Boumadine polymetallic project and holds several other exploration permits. As the only pure-play silver producer listed on the TSX, Aya is dedicated to maximizing shareholder value through sustainable mining practices, resource expansion, and operational excellence in North Africa.
